lines: Kera nari mw isayo Y'ibyaha ngira ngo Nd' uw'Imana, ndi mwiza; Nyuma, nsanga nibeshya.
Imana yanjye Yarandokoye  Ubu,ni Yo nsingiza Kuko yankijije.
Nuko Yes' ansangamo,Mbyigaraguramo, Ati : Mwan' unyemere, Ngutabare,
Haz' Umwuka Wer' u’bwo Mu mutima wanjye, Mbona ko nacumuye; Ndihan'
Mana, ndagushimira Yuk' Umwana wawe Atandetse ngo nzapfa Nkiri mu byaha byanjye.
Reka njye nkuyoboka;Nta wundi nifuza. Noneh' unyiharire; Mwami Yes' untegeke.
Nahatswe na Satani;Nta cyiza yampaye; Amp' urupfu rw'iteka ; Ni kw ahemb’
Ariko, Mucunguzi, Wowe wangabiye Ubugingo ku buntu, Buva ku Musaraba.
